buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A065] text-white hover:bg-[#B08D55] rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg transition-all duration-300

cards.menu_item: bg-white p-6 border border-black/5 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 group

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

layout_strategies.hero: Split layout: Left content (40%), Right visual (60%). Use organic shapes or overlapping elements. No full-width generic banners.
layout_strategies.menu_grid: Masonry or Bento grid. Not a simple list. Group items by category with distinct visual headers.
layout_strategies.gallery: Asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid. Mix landscape, portrait, and square images. Use whitespace.
layout_strategies.footer: Clean, minimal. Large typography for 'Contact'. 3-column layout.

about.alt: Cozy cafe interior with warm lighting

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (h1-h3). Use 'DM Sans' for body text.
Implement a 'Smooth Scroll' behavior using CSS 'scroll-behavior: smooth'.
Do NOT use standard Bootstrap/Grid columns. Use the 'Bento' grid strategy defined in layout_strategies.
Ensure the 'Order Now' button is always visible (sticky header or floating action button on mobile).
The Menu page must be categorized. Do not dump all items in one list.
Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
For the 'Contact' section, embed the Google Map iframe with a grayscale filter to match the elegant theme.
Ensure 'Cash Only' is highlighted prominently near the menu or footer.
Create a 'Services' section using icons (use lucide-react) for Delivery, Takeout, Dine-in.
Use 'framer-motion' for subtle entrance animations (fade-up) on scroll.

do_not_use: Rounded-xl borders (stick to rounded-sm or rounded-full for buttons)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #1A1A1A on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring on focus for all interactive elements.
